message:
test(mesh,raptorq): proptest symbol requests + deterministic golden vectors

fcp-mesh property-based tests (3 new proptests):
- unauthenticated_requests_enforce_normative_cap: validates bounds
  rejection for requests exceeding DEFAULT_MAX_SYMBOLS_UNAUTHENTICATED
- response_builder_never_exceeds_effective_limit: proves symbol
  response count is bounded by min(builder_max, request_max+1)
- targeted_repair_never_resends_already_sent_symbols: verifies
  already-sent exclusion and bounded selection count
- mesh_integration.rs: add clippy allow for too_many_lines,
  cast_sign_loss, cast_possible_truncation

fcp-raptorq golden vector expansion (+809 lines):
- seeded_payload() helper using ChaCha20Rng for cross-platform
  reproducibility of test payloads
- erasure_config() for 50% repair overhead stress testing
- Deterministic golden vector constants (235t.25): pins exact encoded
  output for seeded payloads, detecting raptorq encoding drift via
  BLAKE3 hashes of selected symbols, OTI fields, and structural counts

Minor fixes:
- fcp-telemetry: revert task_local! from fcp_async_core back to tokio
- fcp-sandbox: add Shutdown + Command imports for linux integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
